Chromatic V2

Sound now starts from an explicit browser gesture, shows each center’s live Hertz value, and reads the inverse-dominant register as a tonal/color field.

The field is waiting. Color has not yet inherited the chord.
Browsers require a click before sound can start. Use “Begin / Resume Attunement,” then move sliders. “Play Center Pulse” gives an audible confirmation.
